date_format: YYYY-MM-DD for dates; ISO 8601 for timestamps.
instructions: Return one JSON object. Use the keys, field types, enum casing, and list ordering defined here. Do not include explanatory prose outside JSON.
list_ordering: Lists of stable identifiers must be sorted ascending unless a field explicitly represents a priority queue.
numeric_precision: Counts are integers. Decimal scores or ratios, if any, should be rounded to 3 decimal places.

excluded_patient_ids.ordering: sort IDs ascending where the list contains IDs

preserved_active_allergy_labels.ordering: sort stable IDs ascending unless the field name says queue/ranking

preserved_active_medication_ids.ordering: sort stable IDs ascending unless the field name says queue/ranking

preserved_active_problem_codes.ordering: sort stable IDs ascending unless the field name says queue/ranking

title: Duplicate respiratory chart reconciliation
